text:
@GimmeAFuckinSandwich I've decided to stop talking to you. 

You might respond: "Because you realized you were wrong"

And I would respond: "No. Because I realized I was right."

I like arguing and all, but for this long is just too much. 2 whole weeks! Man! Enough. My ship sails in the morning.
author: @ansonx10

text:
@ansonx10 

I hate it too and I'm in Japan now lol
author: @kasrkinmullet

text: @GimmeAFuckinSandwich I've recently decided I don't like Nintendo either. lol
author: @ansonx10
@ansonx10

text:
@GimmeAFuckinSandwich Well, at least you got the joke.

"Wrong" can be debated, I didn't diss Japan, and this is sill a type of anime. Anime in the sense of the shortened word for animation. But it is Japanese, so it's anime in the sense that I originally intended.

Putting animal parts on cartoons of humans is nothing short of pointless and mentally challenged. I know a lot of people thrive on looking at it though, but I see no sane reason for any of it.

Take it or leave it; it's the internet.
